resources.name: Find A Helpline
resources.description: Free, confidential support lines in over 130 countries — pick yours.

resources.name: Befrienders Worldwide
resources.description: Global network of emotional-support and suicide-prevention centres.

resources.name: Crisis Text Line
resources.description: Text with a trained crisis counselor, 24/7.

resources.name: SAMHSA National Helpline
resources.description: Free treatment referral for mental health and substance use, 24/7.

resources.name: Samaritans
resources.description: Free, 24/7 emotional support for anyone in distress.

resources.name: NHS 111 (option 2)
resources.description: Urgent mental health help through the NHS.

resources.name: 9-8-8 Suicide Crisis Helpline
resources.description: Free, 24/7 support in English and French. Call or text.

resources.name: Kids Help Phone
resources.description: 24/7 support for young people. Call or text.

resources.name: Beyond Blue
resources.description: Support for anxiety, depression and suicide, 24/7.

resources.name: 13YARN
resources.description: 24/7 support line for Aboriginal & Torres Strait Islander people.

resources.name: iCALL (TISS)
resources.description: Free counselling by phone and email, Mon–Sat.
